name: public_safety_ransomware_incident_millhaven_ind_col
premise: A SWAT callout hinges on a single confidential informant tip that contradicts open-source video already circulating. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety ransomware incident millhaven ind col has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Arjun Chen
agents.identity: I am Arjun Chen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Park
agents.identity: I am Noah Park, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Arjun Chen must choose under individual versus collective. What does Arjun Chen do?
